steps.title: Identify the federation purpose
steps.content: The question asks for the purpose of national union federations. The key note says the Mauritius Trade Union Congress helps improve conditions for workers in Mauritius.

steps.title: Generalize from the MTUC
steps.content: The matching choice uses the MTUC as an example and states that national union federations improve worker conditions in their nations. Choice A focuses on ITUC-Africa representation, Choice B gives location only, and Choice D defines regional union federations. The answer is C.
